lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Galaxy overview — the systems, distances, and exploration-data context that make jump range and fuel reach matter.

sources.label: ED Wiki — Explorer
sources.what: Exploration career mechanics (scanning, jump range, cartographics) behind the ranking.

sources.label: Spansh
sources.what: Neutron / galaxy route plotting that sets the practical value of jump range.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Walkthrough of the Mandalay, the SCO-optimized Zorgon Peterson explorer, covering jump range, heat, and fuel economy.
